# Riociguat 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Riociguat 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Riociguat</strong> 目前有 <strong>29 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Riociguat 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Chronic thromboembolic pulmonary hypertension (CTEPH) Adempas is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with WHO Functional Class (FC) II to III with  inoperable CTEPH, persistent or recurrent...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>Ambras type hypertrichosis universalis congenita（94.9%）</li>
<li>malformation syndrome with odontal and/or periodontal component（94.5%）</li>
<li>syndrome with a Dandy-Walker malformation as major feature（94.3%）</li>
<li>isolated genetic hair shaft abnormality（94.0%）</li>
<li>hypertrichosis (disease)（93.8%）</li>
<li>pulmonary arterial hypertension associated with congenital heart disease（92.6%）</li>
<li>pulmonary arteriovenous malformation (disease)（92.1%）</li>
<li>pulmonary arterial hypertension associated with chronic hemolytic anemia（91.5%）</li>
<li>pulmonary arterial hypertension associated with HIV infection（91.5%）</li>
<li>pulmonary arterial hypertension associated with schistosomiasis（91.5%）</li>
<li>pulmonary arterial hypertension associated with connective tissue disease（91.5%）</li>
<li>pulmonary arterial hypertension（90.6%）</li>
<li>hypotrichosis simplex of the scalp（87.5%）</li>
<li>congenital hypotrichosis milia（85.9%）</li>
<li>diffuse alopecia areata（84.9%）</li>
<li>polycystic kidney disease 3 with or without polycystic liver disease（82.6%）</li>
<li>syndrome with limb duplication, polydactyly, syndactyly, and/or hyperphalangy（81.6%）</li>
<li>thoracic malformation（81.5%）</li>
<li>adult familial nephronophthisis-spastic quadriparesia syndrome（79.9%）</li>
<li>renal-hepatic-pancreatic dysplasia（79.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/riociguat/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
